step_rationale: Ceramide lipid altered in atherosclerosis and post-MI remodeling; pro-inflammatory signaling.
mechanism: Altered hexosylceramide metabolism contributes to atherosclerotic plaque lipotoxicity and post-MI ventricular remodeling.

references.title: Ambient Air Pollution and Atherosclerosis: A Potential Mediating Role of Sphingolipids.
